personal.name: Raphael Fischer
personal.affiliation: Lamarr Institute for ML and AI | TU Dortmund University

statement: My research focuses on the sustainability and trustworthiness of AI, exploring implications for our society, economy, and environment. Guided by interdisciplinarity and real-world applications, my PhD contributed new methods for benchmarking, reporting, labeling, and meta-learning, accompanied by practical solutions from the transfer project with Wilo. I also lead the Young AI Leaders Dortmund, under the UN AI for Good mission.

items.title: AI Scientist
items.organization: Lamarr Institute for ML and AI (Dortmund)
highlights: Researching sustainability, resource-awareness and trustworthiness of AI
14 peer-reviewed publications, conference and delegation visits, transfer and network activities

items.title: Data Scientist (part time)
highlights: Working in the strategic partnership with Lamarr Institute (research transfer project)
Exploring AI use cases and prototyping ML solutions for industrial manufacturing

items.title: Working Student
highlights: Software development for DNA sequencing, logging and testing with Qiagen as a client

items.title: PhD in Computer Science

items.title: Research Visit
highlights: Exploring resource efficiency in time series classification

items.title: Master's in Computer Science

Supervisors: Prof. Katharina Morik, Dr. Nico Piatkowski

items.title: Research Visit
highlights: Exploring probabilistic gap filling and cloud removal for satellite image series

12/22 -- Master's student assistant A. van der Staay, working on benchmarking AI edge devices (until 12/23)
